description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Lint and build regularly that runs on push to specific branches and paths, on manual dispatch, and on a daily schedule. The workflow should have multiple jobs: lint_cpp to lint C++ code on ubuntu-22.04, build_cpp to build C++ code on multiple OS and compiler combinations, build_and_lint_go to build and lint Go code on ubuntu-latest, and build_java to build Java code on ubuntu-latest with multiple Java versions.
